P1.name: Curevan Digital TENS Unit - 12 Modes
P1.description: Advanced Transcutaneous Electrical Nerve Stimulation (TENS) unit with 12 pre-programmed modes for targeted pain relief and muscle stimulation.
P1.longDescription: Features a large LCD screen, rechargeable battery, and includes 4 electrode pads. Ideal for home use for chronic pain, arthritis, and post-injury recovery. Always use under the guidance of a qualified therapist.

P2.name: CureFlex Pro Resistance Bands (Set of 5)
P2.description: Set of 5 professional-grade, latex-free resistance loop bands (X-Light, Light, Medium, Heavy, X-Heavy) for strength training.
P2.longDescription: Comes with a convenient travel pouch. Perfect for strengthening glutes, legs, and shoulders in physiotherapy or at-home fitness routines.

G1.name: Curevan Foldable Walker with 8 Adjustments
G1.description: A lightweight, height-adjustable, and foldable walker designed for enhanced mobility and support for the elderly.
G1.longDescription: Made from a durable anodized aluminum frame with non-slip rubber tips. Supports up to 110kg.

N2.name: Fingertip Pulse Oximeter with OLED Display
N2.description: Clinically tested pulse oximeter for accurately measuring blood oxygen saturation (SpO2) and pulse rate.
N2.longDescription: Features a bright, multi-directional OLED display for easy reading. Suitable for all ages. Includes batteries and a lanyard.

P4.name: Hot & Cold Gel Pack with Reusable Wrap
P4.description: Versatile gel pack for both hot and cold therapy to treat injuries, reduce swelling, and soothe muscle pain.
P4.longDescription: Comes with a soft, adjustable wrap to comfortably secure the pack to any body part. Microwave and freezer safe.

P5.name: COMBO3 PLUS - Smart Recovery System
P5.description: Multi-mode therapy system for advanced muscle recovery and pain management.
P5.longDescription: The COMBO3 PLUS combines TENS, EMS, and Massage modes in a single device. Features dual channels with 24 intensity levels and 12 program modes. Perfect for professional and home use.

P6.name: Neck and Shoulder Massager - Deep Tissue
P6.description: Shiatsu neck and shoulder massager with heat for tension relief and relaxation.
P6.longDescription: U-shaped ergonomic design with 8 deep-kneading massage nodes. Includes heat function and intensity control. Ideal for relieving neck stiffness after long hours of work.
